title: Autocorrelated Sampling in Cognition
text:
Warning



This website is still under construction! Some sections might be empty.








NoteRequirements



Before the workshop, please install the R programming language in your machine. An IDE, such as RStudio is recommended but not necessary.
Please install the samplr package in R, which you can do by running:
install.packages("samplr")
If you have issues installing these, please email Lucas Castillo (lucas.castillo@warwick.ac.uk).
